sentence.chinese: 大武部落的第一朵紅心百合，大多是經過義結金蘭的儀式取得佩戴權，長輩會尋求有同樣需求也適合自己的對象，對年齡的差距沒有嚴格限制，當然年齡越相當越適宜，也透過義結金蘭的儀式成為世交。
sentence.ab: kay cekele Labuwa ku nipaswalalanenga sibengelrai ku nipulalaka, patwalai ki tamalalyaliya tulrevege, ku pimahudrawdranga wasilape ku myaliniya muhikaykai lataku mukidremedreme liniya ka eceba, pangukai ki caili kadruwa ka twakucingalre susu, ai, alaiyasi mapapadethe ku caili mathaithahihi, lapatwalai ki tamatulaliya matatulrevege aeaeanga ka wacekecekele.

sentence.chinese: 事前的準備，即是宰豬備禮，當天佩戴百合的主角、家屬及朋友們會坐在椅子上，配合著年長婦女吟唱古調，滿心喜悅地迎接前來佩戴百合的另一方家族。來佩戴紅心百合的一方，要準備八把小米、大鐵鍋、牲禮、阿拜、農作物及飲料，穿著盛裝，舉家大小、扶老攜幼，浩浩蕩蕩高聲歡呼，抬著備禮列隊進入並把所有的備禮放置在對象府上寬廣處，緊接著圍圈和歌跳舞。
sentence.ab: ki pathagila ku apadulruwa, aiculu ku beeke tuhahukudra, idravayvai ku aiamani ku kyapasibengelrai, wacekecekele, hedededela ka lalyali watakaenene ikay ki alruunu, patupapalra ku peleai ki tahudrawdrange, kihagai mukalava idra aikela tulrevege. kudra wakela tulrevege, padulru ku ididiya ka becenge, sasavelra, niculuwa ka labeate ki beeke, abai, singiumawma ka lataleke, lasaungula, ngihagela sikahingalai, makanaelre ku wacekecekele anialavavalake aniatahwahudrange, twahedeedele mababihauhu wangeale idra hahukudra swahahe pikay ki takaswivaa, lamakakai ngithalringulu drwalrai taku senasenai.

sentence.chinese: 接著，由部落耆老逐一點收對方所攜帶的各樣物品，花飾飾權者為對方女子佩戴，象徵該名女子已能在公開的場合佩戴紅心百合，今後要將神聖的紅心百合精神「純潔」如影隨身，時刻叮嚀自己是百合花的榮耀，潔身自愛。在此同時，也將攜帶的刺茄環飾或小米環飾，為主角、部落當家頭目和擁有花飾權的家族佩戴。
sentence.ab:
lapacungulu ku mahudrange ki cekele wasipi akuea idra niluka ka hahukudra, ku amani ku magagemegeme ki bengelrai lapasibengelrai ku nipulalaka ka bangabangale, pathingale kay ababai kay aidulrunga sibengelrai ikay ki hahubuwa, twalai kayasaa ku pathahevanelringa ki nipulalaka ka bangabangale kudra bulaa alrivilrivi niya aimyaki alalingu tupapalra iniya, papulringalringau ka amaninga ku aialrigu ki bangabangale sikapapedrenge ngipapakilibake. 
[===]
idrayasasana laipakisilange malra idra nimailuka ka hatheathe lukai abecenge, bwaai pasibengelrai idra twalrevelrevege, haedre ka talyalalai si amani ku magagemegeme ki bengelrai.

sentence.chinese: 結束後，以同樣的禮數回禮他方。所有儀式結束後，開始設宴擺桌，宴請所有參加盛會的人分享這份喜悅。若經濟能力許可，可以一家一次對兩家或三家，也就是一次佩戴兩朵或三朵紅心百合。備禮是一人一份，兩人就是兩份。
sentence.ab: [-AP1-]lu tulrepenge, laybilringa papiya idra eceba, piya ku tapiyaiya ku kakudha, lupangilrepengenga demedeme sanaakakudhaa, twatake pangiakanea ki cekele pakisupilri pakihagai. alaiyasi malralreme ku tacekecekela, aidulru ngivale tulrevege ku taidrusa taitulru ka daane, kutaiya aimakasibengelrai ngivavale ku drusa tulru ka nipulalaka, ku ea ka bengelrai taiea ku hahukudra, ku drusa ka bengelrai taidrusa ku hahukudra.

sentence.chinese: 除義結金蘭外，佩戴紅心百合的儀式還有結親及結婚儀式，而結親及結婚儀式也分數種。總之，佩戴的百合數量與儀式次數是成正比的，兩、三朵時分層戴，四朵以上分層戴，頭飾太高，一來不美觀，二來重心不穩，女性們就會往兩邊戴。
sentence.ab: kayvai sya bengelrai ki nipulalaka ka bangabangale, singiyakai lu ngipiyale kitulrevege, kaytwalrevege ka kakudha taikalraa, luadrusa atulru wadulrwana apataetadreke sibengelrai, ai lu asupatenga alrimanga kadruwa ka matiyadalame, lakuni ku papubiyabila apacucungulu.

sentence.chinese: 百合花是魯凱族的族花，是魯凱族的族魂，是維繫魯凱族各部落秩序倫理的核心植物。在魯凱族的社會裡，賦予男女不同的社會意義。女性代表聖潔，男性則為狩獵勇士。要戴上紅心百合，過程繁複，勞師動眾，所費不貲。所以，部落婦女更以自愛自制來守護得來不易的紅心百合。
sentence.ab: [-AP1-]kay bangabangale kabengelradhanelringa ki Ngudradrekai, amani ku abake niyake ki Ngudradrekai, amani ku pakahathudu ikay tamacapicapila ki Ngudradrekai, ku pathaheva pangukai ki ababai mabula kimusakene, pangukay ki sauwalai amani kudra magahe ka tahapapana. nausibengelrai ku nipulalaka ka bangabangale luiyaa, matiapangelrace kakalra ku apangimiya, pangwasacekecekela tuhamuhu, lakuni, kay ababai ki Ngudradrekai ngyapapakilibake ngihahuthuku pakilibake ikay kadruwa ka nitupadudulruwa tahumaha ka nipulalaka ka bangabangale.
